name: Southern Smothered-Fried Stead
recipeInstructions:
1. Pound the steak to tenderize it and cut into serving pieces.
2. Season with salt and pepper.
3. Dredge in flour.
4. Heat a few tablespoons of bacon drippings in a heavy frying pan.
5. Brown the steak pieces on both sides, returning all to the pan.
6. Add water to cover; bring to a boil and reduce heat to low.
7. Simmer until tender (about 30-45 minutes).
8. Make gravy by mixing flour with water in a jar until well combined.
9. Add the gravy mixture to the frying pan and return it to a simmer.
10. Stir until the gravy thickens; continue cooking on low, covered for 5 more minutes.
